title: Library of Congress: American Revolution Sources
description: A LOC source card for American Revolution primary sources and classroom inquiry.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: Library of Congress American Revolution materials connect students with letters, broadsides, maps, prints, and documents from the era of independence.
Use this source for sourcing, corroboration, perspective-taking, and tracing how political arguments changed before and during the Revolution.
Library of Congress source sets include public-domain and rights-unknown materials. Use each item page to confirm rights before mirroring individual documents.
